name: Cyberless: Online
short_description: Cyberless: Online," a multiplayer, FPS, and Sci-Fi game, presents the government warfare between two factions, Forces and Rebels. While Rebels argue that elections are rigged, Forces hold the power. Engage in the battle to contribute to the storyline of the Cyberless game series!
detailed_description:
TeamCyberless Community


About the Game

Cyberless: Online is an online action game at the heart of the conflict between two factions, Forces and Rebels. Players engage in team-based battles by choosing one of five different character classes, each equipped with unique weapons such as Gunner, Fireman, Sniper, Bomber, and Doctor.

FORCES AND REBELS TEAM CHARACTERS




Gunner:
A master Rifle Assault user, equipped with a Pistol, and proficient in knife usage.

Sniper:
A sniper rifle user, armed with a Pistol, and skilled in knife combat.

Fireman:
Possesses a Grenade Launcher and can emit flames up to a flashlight's distance, equipped with a Pistol, and proficient in knife usage.

Bomber:
User of a Rocket Launcher, armed with a Pistol, and skilled in knife combat.

Doctor:
A pump-action shotgun user, equipped with a Pistol, and proficient in knife usage.

MAPS





  • Warehouse:
The focal point of conflict between Forces and Rebels, ideal for raids on Forcers' headquarters and intense battles. Utilize tactical intelligence to gain an advantage for your team.



  • Armada:
A sea-themed map, Armada hosts clashes set in a warship atmosphere. The Rebels team engages in conflicts targeting Forcers' naval fleet on this historical warship. Seize strategic positions and engage in war for victory.
